Register using `NS_GENERIC_FACTORY_CONSTRUCTOR` as found in existing component registrations under `toolkit/components/`. Write your files to `/workspace/`. Also write `/workspace/answer.json` listing the Firefox source files you referenced.

- **`NS_DECL_NSIOBSERVERSERVICE`** — declares all observer service interface methods

### `/workspace/MyObserverService.cpp`
Implementation using:
- **`NS_GENERIC_FACTORY_CONSTRUCTOR(MyObserverService)`** — from `xpcom/components/ModuleUtils.h`, generates `MyObserverServiceConstructor(REFNSIID, void**)` that `new`s the class and calls `QueryInterface`

- Method bodies delegating to an internal `nsTHashtable<nsObserverList>`

### `/workspace/components.conf`
Python-based registration (per `toolkit/components/mediasniffer/components.conf` pattern) referencing `MyObserverServiceConstructor` as the factory constructor.
